case_title: DONALD F BURGESS SR VS. ACUMEN ENTERPRISES, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGESS SR, DONALD F AS TO DEFENDANT ACUMEN ENTERPRISES, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
